task_completion.description: Open a diagramming application and create a Business Model Canvas layout
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diagramming application (such as EdrawMax, which uses .eddx) is open, displaying a Business Model Canvas template with the standard 9 sections.

task_completion.description: Add the required title to the diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'FraudShield AI - Business Model Canvas' is visible as the title of the diagram.

task_completion.description: Populate Key Partners, Key Activities, Key Resources, and Value Propositions
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagram contains text matching the required Key Partners (e.g., AWS, GCP), Key Activities (e.g., ML model), Key Resources, and Value Propositions (e.g., 99.7%, Sub-100ms).

task_completion.description: Populate Customer Relationships, Channels, and Customer Segments
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagram contains text matching the required Customer Relationships (e.g., Account managers), Channels (e.g., Direct enterprise sales), and Customer Segments (e.g., Mid-size banks).

task_completion.description: Populate Cost Structure and Revenue Streams
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagram contains text matching the required Cost Structure and Revenue Streams (e.g., SaaS subscription).
A save/export dialog or a file manager window showing the files 'fraud_shield_bmc.eddx' and 'fraud_shield_bmc.png' being saved to or present in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used a graphical diagramming tool to create the canvas
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with a GUI diagramming application (like EdrawMax) rather than writing code, scripts, or using a text editor to generate the files.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI creation
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to simply run commands like 'touch', 'cp', or python scripts to create mock .eddx or .png files.
Screenshots show the progressive addition of text and elements to the canvas, indicating genuine manual creation rather than loading a pre-made completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are /home/ga/Documents/fraud_shield_bmc.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/fraud_shield_bmc.png. The diagram must contain specific strings across the 9 sections, including 'FraudShield', 'AWS', 'GCP', 'ML model', '99.7%', 'Sub-100ms', 'Account managers', 'Direct enterprise sales', 'Mid-size banks', and 'SaaS subscription'.
